title: Evidence Ledger
description: Per-company library of approved proof points available for citation in any proposal. Each entry gets a stable ID (EV-###) that drafts reference via inline HTML comments. Location: my-company/evidence-ledger.json (user-local, gitignored). Consumed by proposal-writer (picks citations), /evidence-check (diffs citations vs. ledger), and red-team-review Gold Team (scores unsupported claims).

generated_at.description: Last update. Humans may edit this file directly; the timestamp marks the last human or skill-driven update.

owner.description: Company name (e.g., 'Acme Defense'). Optional but recommended.

items.description: Evidence items available for citation. Items are append-only in practice — once approved for a proposal, they stay in the ledger. Superseded items get status='retired' rather than deleted.

id.description: Stable identifier, e.g., 'EV-022'. Three or four digits. Never reused after retirement.

type.description: Category of evidence. Roughly ranked by credibility (past_performance through partnership are strong; product_demo and analyst_mention are weaker).

summary.description: One-sentence human-readable description. Displayed in the writer's citation picker.

detail.description: Longer-form explanation of the evidence. Optional. Used by writer when drafting the claim's supporting prose.

source_file.description: Path (relative to repo root) to the authoritative source document for this evidence, e.g., 'my-company/past-performance.md' or 'my-company/artifacts/company-model-spec.pdf'.

source_anchor.description: Where in source_file to find the evidence (e.g., section heading, page number).

contract_number.description: For past_performance / customer_deployment / cpars_rating — the contract / award number if releasable.

customer.description: Named customer organization. Use the redacted/approved form if the real customer name can't be used externally.

relevance_tags.description: Tags to help the writer surface this evidence for the right sections (e.g., 'ddil', 'on-device', 'il5', 'adapter-specialization', 'sf', 'psyop').

approval_status.description: approved = cleared for citation. pending_review = don't cite yet. retired = superseded/stale — do not cite. restricted = cleared only for specific classification/distribution contexts.

restrictions.description: If approval_status=restricted, describe what contexts allow citation (e.g., 'Government-only distribution; do not use in commercial or CSO proposals').

cpars_rating.description: For type=cpars_rating — the CPARS-style rating. Used by past-performance skill for confidence scoring.

proof_strength.description: Evidence credibility tier from reference/proposal-writing-patterns.md. Deployed customer references = highest; internal demos / analyst mentions = low.
